headline: Kroger Senior Vice President Valerie Jabbar Announces Retirement After 38 Years of Service
summary: The Kroger Co. today announced that Valerie Jabbar, senior vice president of Retail Divisions, retired in May after 38 years of service.

headline: Walmart’s Hot Stock Was Knocked Lower This Week. Is It Time to Do Some Value Shopping?
summary: Shares of the big-box store slid after the company struck a 'cautious tone' about consumers during its first-quarter earnings call early Thursday moring.

raw.headline: Walmart’s Hot Stock Was Knocked Lower This Week. Is It Time to Do Some Value Shopping?

headline: Walmart, Kroger, ELF Beauty Pledge Price Cuts. They're Going To Sting.
summary: Walmart and Kroger plans to cut prices broadly as high gas prices squeeze consumers. But the retailers face higher costs too.

raw.headline: Walmart, Kroger, ELF Beauty Pledge Price Cuts. They're Going To Sting.
raw.summary: Walmart and Kroger plans to cut prices broadly as high gas prices squeeze consumers. But the retailers face higher costs too.

headline: Memorial Day cookout costs rise again
summary: Memorial Day cookouts are getting more expensive this year as key BBQ staples like ground beef, hot dogs, and beer post sharp price increases in the latest CPI data. CNBC’s Brandon Gomez breaks down how shoppers are navigating higher costs and what grocers are doing to attract increasingly price-conscious consumers.
